root.sql:
SELECT sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name, sc_dep_m_rule.minbalanceforint, sc_dep_m_rule.minimum_balance_total, sc_dep_m_rule.int_month_status, sc_dep_m_rule.min_balance_monthly_int, sc_dep_m_rule.op_monthly_date, sc_dep_m_rule.stm_monthly_date, sc_dep_m_saving_deposit_cond.period_calculate_bonus, sc_dep_m_saving_deposit_cond.op_compound_date, sc_dep_m_saving_deposit_cond.stm_compound_date ,coalesce( ( select count( 1) from sc_dep_m_creditor where deposit_balance > 0 and deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) , 0 ) as c_count
,coalesce( ( select count( 1) from sc_dep_m_creditor where deposit_balance > 0 and deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code -- and deposit_balance < sc_dep_m_rule.minimum_balance_total and deposit_balance < sc_dep_m_rule.minbalanceforint ) , 0 ) as c_count_not FROM sc_dep_m_rule, sc_dep_m_saving_deposit_cond WHERE ( sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_saving_deposit_cond.deposit_type_code ) and ( ( sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code = '01' ) ) and sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code in ( select deposit_type_code from sc_dep_m_creditor where deposit_balance <> 0 )
